probes.name: rbac-schema-current
probes.description: Verifies the spatie migrations have run + our column additions (application_id, tenant_id, is_system, etc.) are in place on roles + permissions + pivots.

probes.name: rbac-catalogue-loaded
probes.description: PermissionCatalogueLoader has finished scanning every #[ProvidesPermissions] provider and the `permissions` table holds at least the framework-tier rows (foundation.*, compliance.*, auth.*, rbac.*).

probes.name: rbac-cache-reachable
probes.description: Configured cache store (config('rbac.cache.store'), default `redis`) reachable for a ping+set+get round-trip. Critical because DB-only fallback is 40x slower and cannot sustain steady-state load.

probes.name: rbac-broadcast-reachable
probes.description: Redis pubsub reachable for cross-node invalidation. Non-critical because TTL-based eviction still bounds staleness; probe alerts ops the cache lags.

probes.name: rbac-role-definitions-seeded
probes.description: role_definitions table has rows for every declared business_type in `data/role-catalogue.json`. Failure indicates `rbac:sync-role-definitions` never ran.

probes.name: rbac-system-roles-immutable
probes.description: Verifies the RoleObserver is registered + refuses is_system=true mutations. Runs a dry-transaction that attempts to rename a system role and confirms the refusal.

probes.name: rbac-purge-scheduler-alive
probes.description: PurgeExpiredRoleAssignmentsJob has run in the last 2 hours. Failure indicates the hourly scheduled task is stuck OR the queue worker is behind.

probes.name: rbac-resolver-under-latency-budget
probes.description: Runs a warm-cache permission check against a probe principal and asserts the p95 latency across 100 samples is under 5ms. Alerts ops when the cache is thrashing.

probes.name: rbac-orphaned-pivots
probes.description: Counts rows in model_has_roles / model_has_permissions where the referenced role / permission has been hard-deleted (should never happen — FK is CASCADE). Warns on non-zero count.

probes.name: rbac-custom-role-quota-not-exceeded
probes.description: Enumerates tenants where custom role count exceeds their `custom_role_slot` entitlement (should never happen — observer enforces). Warns on non-zero count.
